questions: What are profit margin benchmarks for ecommerce in 2025?
How should merchants use margin benchmarks?
qa.answer: Benchmarks vary by category; healthy net margins are often in high single to low double digits, with contribution margins used for unit economics. Use benchmarks to set pricing, CAC guardrails, and inventory priorities.
implication: Model contribution margin by SKU; align CAC/payback targets.
Adjust pricing, bundles, and promotions to hit target margins.
Prioritize ad spend toward higher‑margin, in‑stock SKUs.
